falsifiers: State pruning does not extend held-out endurance over the capsule baseline.
A fixed cycle-85 retirement does not extend endurance once inherited defects are preserved.
Telemetry-triggered retirement does not outperform the fixed schedule.
Digest-based correction adds no endurance or harms checkpoint accuracy.
The combined restoration stack fails to carry a median run through 160 or 320 cycles.
A sham restart that preserves defects performs as well as verified reconstruction.
The restoration stack still wins when context pressure and most exogenous noise are disabled.
